name: node-envinfo
title: node-envinfo
summary: Generate reports of the common details used by Node.js packages
description:
Generate reports of the common details used by Node.js packages
This package generate reports of common software installed on a computer,
including browser version, Node.js version, Operating System and programming
language support.
.
This is used by webpack a javascript module bundler, for generating build
time report.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-envinfo because Generate reports of the common details used by Node.js packages.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-envinfo as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-envinfo with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-envinfo --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
